images.depicts: red fox head/paws popping up over a cardboard box edge
fox eyes and ears peeking over a box/cardboard rim, close-up
wooden box with number 6 carved on side, six acorns piled, fox beside it
tabby cat and fox heads together, both peering out of a cardboard box
white duck belly-flopping into a cardboard box, striped sock in its bill, feathers flying
fox, cat and duck cuddled/sleeping together resting on a box edge
images.issue: Correct trio of animals + box present, but pose is a calm sleepy cuddle rather than the artNote's 'overflowing, tangled, box bulging' chaotic mix — tone mismatch, not a content mismatch. Usable as-is.

images.depicts: large ox standing over/beside an already-shredded, destroyed cardboard box, ox mostly free/outside
images.issue: Filename and every use (book spread 8, word-song Verse 4 'STUCK in the box', artNote 'only its rump in, box splitting') require the ox visibly WEDGED/STUCK inside the box with the box still recognizably a box straining around it. This image instead shows the box already torn to pieces on the ground with the ox standing over/past it — no containment is depicted, so it does not read as 'the ox is in the box' or 'stuck.' Needs regeneration.

images.depicts: raw potato sitting at the open front corner of a box, fox looking on from the right
images.issue: Potato sits at the box's near corner/threshold rather than deep inside, but the box is clearly open and the potato is within it — reasonable match to 'the potato sits alone inside, spotlit, fox peeking in from the edge.'

images.depicts: small wood axe with wooden handle, standalone
pair of striped socks (red/yellow/white/green) worn on feet
chunk of yellow beeswax with honeycomb texture

line_map.lines: [Intro — whispered] …ks …ks …ks (the sound hides at the END)
line_map.note: Abstract phonetic-sound line, not a visual noun.

line_map.lines: [Hook 1] X! X! …ks …ks! What ENDS with X? A box! B-O-X! It's a box! (a box!)
line_map.note: No standalone plain-box photo exists in the Week 24 folder (box.png is a cross-week fallback reused from Week 13, out of this week's own asset set). Every Week-24 box image already has an animal in it.

line_map.lines: [Hook 2] X! X! …ks …ks! What ENDS with X? A fox! F-O-X! It's a fox! (a fox!)
line_map.note: Clear fox reveal shot; box in frame is not a problem for this line.

line_map.lines: [Hook 3] X! X! …ks …ks! What ENDS with X? Six! S-I-X! It is six! (it's six!)
line_map.note: six-in-box.png is a fine alternate/second shot for this line too.

line_map.lines: [Breakdown — whispered] …ks is two sounds… /k/ and /s/… ox… wax… taxi… (…ks hiding inside!) X never starts — X hides at the end!
line_map.note: 'ox' → ox-in-box.png shows an ox so it's usable for the word mention even though the image has its own containment problem (see wrong_art). 'wax' → wax.png is a clean match. 'taxi' → no taxi image exists anywhere in the Week 24 folder; needs generation.

line_map.lines: [Bridge] A potato?! (does it end in X? NO!) P-p-potato! Not X! (…ks …ks)
line_map.note: Potato + fox gag image works for the potato joke beat.

line_map.lines: [Final Hook] Mix! M-I-X! Mix it up, mix it up! …ks …ks …ks!
line_map.note: Correct trio present; tone is calmer than 'mix it up' energy but content is right.

generate.line: Hook 1 — 'A box! B-O-X! It's a box!'
generate.mj_prompt: a plain cardboard box with the lid ajar and something bright watching from the dark slit inside, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw
a yellow toy taxi cab, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: Shows the ox standing over an already-shredded, destroyed box rather than wedged/stuck inside an intact-but-straining box. Weak for the 'ox' word mention and unusable for the containment gag proper (see word-song Verse 4).
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate so the ox is visibly wedged into the box with only its rear end inside and the box still recognizable, straining/splitting but not already torn to pieces.
wrong_art.mj_prompt: an enormous ox with only its hind end wedged into a small cardboard box, front legs and head free outside, the box straining and splitting at the seams around its body, comedic tight squeeze, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

line_map.note: Eyes/ears peeking over the rim is a near-literal match for 'peek… peek…'.

line_map.lines: [Hook] A fox in a box! A fox in a box! Who is in the box? (the fox! the fox!) The fox is in the box!
[Verse 2] Six in a box! Six in a box! Who is in the box? (six! six!) Six are in the box!
[Verse 3] The cat is in the box! The duck is in the box! Who is in the box? (mix! a big mix!) Mix it up in the box!
line_map.image: cat-in-box.png (cat line), duck-in-box.png (duck line), mix-in-box.png (mix line)
line_map.note: Three sequential lines, three correct matching images already exist.

line_map.lines: [Verse 4] The ox is in the box?! The ox is in the box?! (too big! too big!) The ox is STUCK in the box!
line_map.note: Existing image shows the box already destroyed and the ox essentially free, not 'too big / stuck in' — see wrong_art entry under the sound song for the shared fix.

line_map.lines: [Outro] What is in the box? (POTATO!) A fox in a box… (peek… shhh…)
line_map.note: Potato + fox peeking covers both the reveal and the closing peek beat.

wrong_art.issue: Same as sound-song entry — box already shredded, ox not depicted as stuck/contained, breaks the 'too big! STUCK in the box!' payoff line of Verse 4.
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate so the ox is visibly wedged into an intact-but-straining box (rear end in, box splitting at seams, not already torn apart).
wrong_art.mj_prompt: an enormous ox with only its hind end wedged into a small cardboard box, front legs and head free outside, the box straining and splitting at the seams around its body, comedic tight squeeze, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw
